title: scaffold project structure
description: Create index.html, main.css skeleton, and all src/ module stubs so imports resolve.
notes: Created full project scaffold: index.html, styles/main.css, src/main.js, src/core/{state,events,tick,actions}.js, src/systems/{resources,research}.js, src/ui/{hud,buildingPanel,messageLog,researchPanel,tabs}.js, src/data/{buildings,units,techs}.js, src/utils/{logger,fmt}.js. Also created CLAUDE.md, roadmap.md, tasks.json, execution.log.

title: implement state, events, and tick loop
description: state.js (initial state), events.js (pub/sub), tick.js (setInterval 250ms emitting tick).
notes: state.js: full initial state with resources/rates/caps/buildings/units/techs/queues/messages. events.js: tiny pub/sub (on/off/emit) with Events constants. tick.js: 250ms interval loop with registerSystem(), startLoop(), stopLoop(). All systems registered in main.js.

title: implement resource system with production/consumption rates
description: resources.js system: on each tick, apply rates to state.resources. Rates derived from buildings and techs.
notes: Implemented as part of T001/T002 bootstrap. resources.js: recalcRates() sums building production/consumption with tech multipliers and unit upkeep; resourceTick() applies per-tick delta capped at caps; advances training queue. Integrated into tick loop via registerSystem().

title: implement building system (build, upgrade, demolish)
description: buildings data file, actions for build/upgrade/demolish, cost deduction, rate recalculation.
notes: data/buildings.js: 12 buildings with icon/cost/production/consumption/capBonus/requires. actions.js: buildBuilding() with 15%-per-level cost scaling, demolishBuilding(), trainUnit(). All trigger recalcRates() and emit events.

title: render resource HUD and building panel UI
description: UI components: resource bar at top, building cards panel, message log at bottom.
notes: hud.js: 6-resource HUD bar with icon/value/cap/rate, updates throttled to 1s. buildingPanel.js: grid of building cards with locked state, cost display, build/demolish buttons, click delegation. messageLog.js: scrolling event log, 15 visible entries. tabs.js: tab switcher for Buildings/Research/Log panels. researchPanel.js: tech tree with progress bar, prerequisite gating.

title: add unit data and training queue
description: units.js data, training queue system, UI panel for military.
notes: units.js: 4 units (soldier, archer, knight, mage) with cost/trainTicks/attack/defense/upkeep/requires. Training queue processed in resourceTick()._advanceTrainingQueue(). trainUnit() action in actions.js. Military panel (T007 session): militaryPanel.js added with army summary, training queue progress bar, and unit cards with cost/stat display and Train buttons.

title: implement map grid (20x20 tiles, fog of war)
description: Canvas-based 20x20 tile map with fog of war reveal on territory capture.
notes: systems/map.js: initMap() generates 20x20 tile grid with 5 terrain types (grass/forest/hills/river/mountain), player 3x3 capital at (10,10), ~20 enemy settlements. revealAround() expands fog on capture. territoryRateBonus() returns per-second rate bonuses for captured terrain (forest +wood, hills +stone, river +food, mountain +iron, grass +gold). ui/mapPanel.js: 480x480 canvas with terrain colours, player/enemy tints, fog-of-war, hover highlight for attackable tiles, click-to-attack. events.js: MAP_CHANGED, COMBAT added. state.js: map field added. index.html: Map and Military tabs added. main.js: initMap() called on boot/new-game, map saved/loaded.

title: basic combat resolution engine
description: Attack action, power calculation, outcome resolution, resource loot.
notes: systems/combat.js: attackTile(x,y) validates adjacency/fog/owner, sums unit attack values (with tech multipliers for tactics/steel/engineering), resolves combat probabilistically (win chance = power/(power+defense)), victory captures tile + grants loot + reveals neighbors, defeat loses 1 random unit. Defense scales with distance from capital (15 + dist*6). Log messages use combat-win/combat-loss types with matching CSS border colours.

title: territory capture and expansion mechanics
description: Capture adjacent tiles, apply territory bonuses to resource rates.
notes: Implemented as part of T007/T008. territoryRateBonus() in map.js returns rate bonuses integrated into recalcRates() in resources.js. Capturing tiles via attackTile() immediately triggers recalcRates() so bonuses apply. Map stats bar shows live territory/enemy/explored tile counts.

title: tech tree data and research system
description: techs.js data with prerequisites, research action, tick-based progress.
notes: Implemented as part of bootstrap. data/techs.js: 6 techs with cost/researchTicks/effectDesc/requires. systems/research.js: startResearch() validates prereqs and deducts cost; researchTick() advances queue and applies tech. ui/researchPanel.js: full tech tree UI with progress bar and gating.

title: save/load via localStorage (auto-save every 60s)
description: Serialize state to localStorage on interval, load on page open, manual save/load buttons.
notes: Implemented in main.js: _save() serializes state to localStorage key 'empireos-save'; _loadSave()/_applySave() restore on boot. Auto-save every 60s via setInterval. Manual Save button in title bar. New Game button clears save and reinits state. Version bumped to 2 to include map state.

title: tech effects applied to rates and unlock gates
description: Apply tech research bonuses to building multipliers, unit attack, and unlock requirements.
notes: Added 3 combat techs (tactics +25% attack, steel +50% attack, engineering +10% attack + unlocks Watchtower) to techs.js. Added tech requirements: knight requires metalworking, mage requires arcane, watchtower requires engineering. Wired warcraft -25% training speed in trainUnit() with totalTicks stored in queue entry for correct progress bar. buildingPanel now re-renders on TECH_CHANGED. militaryPanel reqStr shows tech icons/names via TECHS lookup. Army display shows tech-boosted combat power.

title: prestige / age advancement mechanic
description: Age system (Stone/Bronze/Iron/Medieval), unlock new buildings/units per age, prestige button.
notes: Created data/ages.js with 4 ages (Stone/Bronze/Iron/Medieval) each with productionMult (1.0/1.25/1.5/2.0), resource cost, and requirements (totalBuildings, totalUnits, territory, tech). Added state.age=0 to state.js. Added AGE_CHANGED event. Added advanceAge() to actions.js with full requirement checking + cost deduction. Applied age productionMult to building production in resources.js recalcRates(). Added age requirements to archeryRange (Bronze) and knight unit (Bronze). Building and military panels handle type:'age' in unlock logic and re-render on AGE_CHANGED. Research panel shows age section at top with current age, next age requirements checklist, cost, and Advance button. Age badge in title bar. Save/load includes age field (version 3).

title: random event system (raids, windfalls, disasters)
description: Time-triggered random events that affect resources, units, or territory.
notes: Created src/systems/randomEvents.js with 10 events (3 raids: bandit_raid/goblin_attack/pirates; 4 windfalls: merchant_caravan/bountiful_harvest/ore_vein/mana_surge; 3 disasters: drought/mine_collapse/plague). Disasters push temporary rate modifiers into state.randomEvents.activeModifiers, consumed by recalcRates() in resources.js. Events fire on a weighted-random 120–240s interval. initRandomEvents() wired in main.js boot; randomEventTick() registered as a tick system. state.randomEvents saved/loaded (save version 4). Log colours: raid=red, windfall=green, disaster=orange.

title: quest/objective system with rewards
description: Milestone objectives (first building, first unit, first capture, etc.) with resource rewards.
notes: Created src/systems/quests.js with 11 milestone quests (first_building/first_unit/five_buildings/first_research/first_capture/army_ten/ten_buildings/twenty_territory/age_bronze/age_iron/age_medieval). Each quest has a check() predicate, icon, and resource reward. initQuests() subscribes to BUILDING_CHANGED/UNIT_CHANGED/TECH_CHANGED/AGE_CHANGED/MAP_CHANGED. Created src/ui/questPanel.js rendering a card grid with completion progress bar; added 🏆 Quests tab in index.html. Added QUEST_COMPLETED event constant. state.quests saved/loaded. CSS: quest-card, quest-header, progress bar gold fill, log-entry--quest.

title: empire log / story panel
description: Narrative story panel showing empire history milestones.
notes: Created src/systems/story.js: initStory() registers dedup-safe milestone entries on GAME_STARTED/BUILDING_CHANGED/UNIT_CHANGED/TECH_CHANGED/AGE_CHANGED/MAP_CHANGED/QUEST_COMPLETED events. 16 milestone checks (founding, building x4, military x3, research x3, age x3, territory x4, quest per-completion). Created src/ui/storyPanel.js: vertical timeline with icon, title, desc, tick-to-time footer; type-based left border accent colours. Added state.story=[] to state.js (reset in initState). Included in save/load (version 5). Added '📖 History' tab in index.html. Wired initStory+initStoryPanel in main.js. Added full CSS: .story-header, .story-timeline (::before vertical line), .story-entry (icon on line, body), type-accent border colours.

title: settings panel (speed, sound toggle)
description: Settings tab with game speed slider (0.5×/1×/2×/4×) and placeholder sound toggle.
notes: Extended src/core/tick.js: added _speedMult module var; setTickSpeed(mult) restarts interval at TICK_MS/mult; getTickSpeed() returns current mult; startLoop uses _speedMult so loops started after a speed change use the right interval. Created src/ui/settingsPanel.js: speed button row (½×/1×/2×/4×) with active highlight, disabled sound checkbox with 'Coming soon' badge, About section. Added '⚙️ Settings' tab in index.html. Wired initSettingsPanel in main.js. Added full CSS in main.css: .settings-section, .speed-buttons, .btn--speed, .btn--speed-active, .settings-toggle.

title: visual polish — CSS animations, transitions
description: Resource gain/loss flash, building card pop-in, combat flash on map tiles.
notes: Added @keyframes flash-gain/flash-loss/pop-in/slide-in to main.css. hud.js: tracks _prevValues per resource; flashes .hud__value--gain/.hud__value--loss when |delta| > 40 (filters per-tick noise). buildingPanel.js: added data-building-id attr to all cards; BUILDING_CHANGED handler calls _popCard(id) which applies .building-card--popin animation. mapPanel.js: _combatFlash module var + rAF-driven _animateFlash() fades an rgba overlay on the attacked tile over ~315ms (19 frames); MAP_CHANGED listener branches on data.outcome to trigger flash vs plain re-render. CSS: .log-entry:first-child gets slide-in so newest log entries animate in.

title: responsive layout for mobile
description: Map canvas scales down, HUD wraps gracefully, panels usable on 375px width.
notes: Added @media (max-width: 480px) block to main.css: title bar condensed (font-size, padding); HUD resources shrink to flex: 1 1 30% with 10px font; tab bar uses overflow-x:auto + scrollbar-width:none (hidden scrollbar on all platforms); all card grids (buildings, units, techs, quests) collapse to single column; map canvas uses width:100%/height:auto with touch-action:none; story timeline icon offset reduced; research-active stacks vertically; age-panel tighter padding. Also enhanced existing 600px breakpoint.

title: diplomacy system (alliances, trade routes)
description: AI empires, alliance/war status, trade route resource exchange per tick.
notes: Created data/empires.js with 3 AI empires (Iron Horde/Mage Council/Sea Wolves), each with tradeGift rates and AI probability params. Created systems/diplomacy.js: initDiplomacy(), diplomacyTick() with AI stance changes (neutral↔allied↔war) and war raids; player actions proposeAlliance/openTradeRoute/closeTradeRoute/declareWar/proposePeace with gold costs (200/100/—/—/300). Created ui/diplomacyPanel.js: empire cards showing relation badge, specialty, live trade income, context-sensitive action buttons. Trade income integrated into resources.js recalcRates() by reading state.diplomacy directly (no circular import). Added DIPLOMACY_CHANGED event. Added Diplomacy tab to index.html. Save version bumped to 7.

title: seasons cycle affecting resource rates
description: 4-season cycle (90s each), rate modifiers per season per resource.
notes: Created data/seasons.js with 4 seasons (Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter, 90s each). Spring: food +25%, wood +10%. Summer: wood +20%, food +10%, gold +10%. Autumn: food +15%, stone +20%, gold +20%. Winter: food -30%, wood -20%. Created systems/seasons.js: initSeasons(), seasonTick() advances season and emits SEASON_CHANGED; currentSeason()/seasonTicksRemaining() helpers. Season multipliers applied in resources.js recalcRates() to positive rates only (unit upkeep unaffected). Added season badge in title bar with live countdown tooltip. Added SEASON_CHANGED event. Save version 7.

title: hero unit with special abilities
description: Hero unit with unique abilities (battle cry, inspire, siege), recruit once per game.
notes: Created data/hero.js with HERO_DEF (Champion, +60 attack, 3 abilities). recruitHero()/useHeroAbility() in actions.js. Hero upkeep in recalcRates(); Inspire doubles training speed in _advanceTrainingQueue(). Combat: hero adds flat +60 power; Battle Cry ×2 attack on next strike (consumed); Siege Master guarantees win (winChance=1.0, consumed). militaryPanel.js: hero section shows recruit card (age-gated, cost-gated) or active hero with ability buttons + cooldown countdowns (16-tick refresh). army section shows hero badge. HERO_CHANGED event. state.hero saved/loaded (version 8). CSS: .hero-card, .hero-card--active, .btn--hero, .hero-ability, .btn--ability, .hero-effect--active/--cd, .mil-unit-badge--hero, .log-entry--hero.

title: leaderboard (localStorage high scores)
description: Track best territory count and gold earned per session, display top 5.
notes: state.stats = {goldEarned, peakTerritory} added to state.js+initState(). goldEarned tracked in resourceTick() (adds gold rate/tick when positive). peakTerritory updated on MAP_CHANGED in main.js._updatePeakTerritory(). _saveToLeaderboard() called on New Game before wipe; saves {name, territory, goldEarned, age, quests, tick, date} to 'empireos-leaderboard' localStorage key; keeps top 10 sorted by territory then gold. settingsPanel.js: leaderboard section renders top-5 rows in a grid table with clear button. state.stats saved/loaded (save version 8). CSS: .lb-table, .lb-header, .lb-row (--gold for #1), .lb-rank/name/territory/gold/age/date.

title: export/import save as JSON string
description: Encode state as base64 JSON, provide copy/paste import modal.
notes: Created src/ui/saveModal.js: initSaveModal(onImport) injects modal DOM + close handlers (X button, Cancel, Esc, click-outside); exportSave() builds payload, base64-encodes with Unicode-safe btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(json))), shows modal with clipboard copy (with execCommand fallback); importSave() shows paste textarea, decodes with decodeURIComponent(escape(atob())), validates save.state field, calls onImport callback. Updated settingsPanel.js: imports exportSave/importSave; added '💾 Save Portability' section with Export and Import buttons; binds them in _render(). Updated main.js: imports initSaveModal; calls initSaveModal(_applySave) after UI init. CSS: .modal-overlay (fixed inset, backdrop-filter blur), .modal--hidden (display:none), .modal-box, .modal-header/.title/.close, .modal-body/.desc/.textarea/.error, .modal-footer, .btn--ghost, .save-port-buttons; responsive mobile rules.

title: victory and defeat conditions with endgame screen
description: Win by reaching Medieval Age + 80 territory + 10 quests. Lose by starvation (food=0 for 30s). Game-over overlay shows stats and Play Again button.
notes: Created systems/victory.js: initVictory() resets module-level counters; victoryTick() checks win (age≥3 + tiles≥80 + quests≥10), lose (food=0 + negative rate for 120 ticks / 30s); warns at 60 starvation ticks; calls stopLoop() + emits GAME_OVER on trigger. Created ui/gameOverPanel.js: appends overlay to body; subscribes to GAME_OVER; renders win/lose box with stats (age, territory, quests, gold earned, time played), Play Again button which calls _newGame(). Added GAME_OVER event to events.js. Added state.gameOver field to state.js initState(). main.js: extracted _newGame() function (startLoop() + initVictory() + all system resets); old New Game button handler calls _newGame(); initGameOverPanel(_newGame) wired after UI init; victoryTick registered as 6th tick system; initVictory() called on boot. CSS: .game-over-overlay (fixed, z-2000, blur backdrop, fade-in animation), .game-over-box (win=gold border, lose=red border, pop-in animation), .game-over-stats (3-col grid), .go-stat-* cells, .game-over-btn.

title: resource trading market (buy/sell for gold)
description: Market system with fluctuating prices (±10% random walk every 15s). Buy/sell food/wood/stone/iron/mana for gold. Requires Market building. Market tab with price table, trend arrows, and buy/sell buttons (×10/×50/×100).
notes: Created src/systems/market.js: initMarket() seeds state.market with per-resource price multipliers (1.0), trend indicators, and totalTrades counter; marketTick() applies ±7.5% random drift every 15s (bounded 0.4–2.5×); buyPrice()/sellPrice() apply 20% spread over base gold values (food=1.5g, wood=2g, stone=3g, iron=5g, mana=10g); sellResources()/buyResources() validate Market building requirement, deduct/add correctly capped resources, increment totalTrades, emit MARKET_CHANGED. Created src/ui/marketPanel.js: locked-state card when no Market building; price table with resource name/stock, sell price (green)+trend arrow, buy price (red), ×10/×50/×100 sell (green) and buy (red) buttons; click delegation with btn--shake feedback on error. Added MARKET_CHANGED + ACHIEVEMENT_UNLOCKED events to events.js. Added state.market null field to state.js. index.html: 🏪 Market tab + panel. main.js: marketTick registered as 7th system; initMarket() called on boot + newGame; market saved/loaded (save version 9). CSS: market-locked, market-header, market-table (5-col grid), market-row, market-price--sell/--buy, trend--up/down/flat, btn--xs/--sell/--buy, btn--shake keyframes, mobile collapses to single column.

title: achievements system (persistent cross-game badges)
description: 15 achievements stored in empireos-achievements localStorage key (persists across New Game wipes). Check on game events. Show in Settings panel with icon, title, desc, unlock date. Achievements section with locked/unlocked states. Toast message on unlock.
notes: Created src/systems/achievements.js: 15 achievement definitions (founder/builder/warlord/scholar/bronze_dawn/medieval/conqueror/diplomat/champion/wonder_built/quest_master/millionaire/trader/emperor/comeback). loadAchievements() reads empireos-achievements localStorage key; initAchievements() rebuilds in-memory _unlocked Set and registers event listeners on BUILDING_CHANGED/UNIT_CHANGED/TECH_CHANGED/AGE_CHANGED/MAP_CHANGED/DIPLOMACY_CHANGED/HERO_CHANGED/QUEST_COMPLETED/MARKET_CHANGED/RESOURCE_CHANGED/GAME_OVER/MESSAGE. _checkAndUnlock(id) calls predicate then _unlock() which persists to localStorage, adds achievement log message (type='achievement'), emits ACHIEVEMENT_UNLOCKED, calls _renderer callback. setAchievementRenderer() allows settingsPanel to register a re-render hook without circular imports. Updated settingsPanel.js: imports ACHIEVEMENTS/loadAchievements/setAchievementRenderer; _achievementsSection() builds ach-card grid with unlocked (gold border, unlock date) and locked (greyed, lock icon) states; 'X / 15 unlocked' progress count; registered _renderer in initSettingsPanel. main.js: imports+calls initAchievements() on boot and newGame. CSS: ach-grid (auto-fill 220px), ach-card (unlocked=gold border+tint, locked=55% opacity), ach-icon/body/title/desc/date/locked-label; log-entry--achievement (gold border + faint gold bg).

title: toast notification system
description: Slide-in toasts for key game events (quest complete, achievement, age advance, raid, windfall, disaster). Show for 3.5s then fade out. Fixed bottom-right position, event-type colour coding.
notes: Created src/ui/toastManager.js: initToasts() creates #toast-container and subscribes to MESSAGE events; shows toast only for types in TOAST_TYPES set (quest/achievement/age/raid/windfall/disaster); showToast() creates .toast div with type modifier class, auto-dismisses after 3.5s via setTimeout; click dismisses immediately; _dismissToast() adds .toast--exiting class for exit animation then removes from DOM on animationend (with 400ms fallback). CSS: #toast-container fixed bottom-right z-900; @keyframes toast-in (translateX slide from right) / toast-out (reverse); 8 type colour variants via border-left-color; mobile shrinks to calc(100vw-24px). Wired in main.js boot sequence.

title: empire summary dashboard panel
description: New '📊 Empire' tab with at-a-glance overview: resource rates, territory, army power, diplomacy status, season, quest/achievement progress, lifetime stats.
notes: Created src/ui/summaryPanel.js with 6 summary cards in a responsive auto-fill grid. Empire header shows name/age/season badges. Resources card: all 6 with icon/name/value:cap/rate (positive=green, negative=red). Military card: unit rows with count+attack, hero row, training queue count, total attack power (with tech multipliers applied). Territory card: player tiles/%, enemy tiles, explored count. Diplomacy card: 3 empire rows with relation badge (neutral/allied/war colour coded) and trade route count. Progression card: quest progress bar (X/N + % fill), achievements bar (reads empireos-achievements localStorage, X/15), victory conditions checklist (Medieval Age + 80 territory + 10 quests) with green/red check icons. Lifetime Stats card: gold earned, peak territory, market trades, time played. Panel re-renders on 12 event types; RESOURCE_CHANGED throttled 4-tick; TICK drives a visibility-gated countdown re-render for time + season freshness. Added '📊 Empire' as first tab in tab bar (auto-activated by tabs.js). CSS: summary-grid auto-fill 230px; summary-card; sum-res-row/sum-stat-row/sum-dipl-row; sum-progress with quest/ach/victory fill variants; summary-empire-header/name/meta/badge. Mobile: single column at ≤480px.

title: wonder buildings (3 unique late-game structures)
description: Great Library (-25% research time, +1 mana/s), Colosseum (-33% training time, +3 food/s), Grand Cathedral (+8 gold/s, -50% disaster severity). Each unique (max 1 per game).
notes: Added 3 wonder buildings to data/buildings.js with unique:true, wonder:true flags: greatLibrary (🏛️, Iron Age, arcane+manaWell×2, cost 500g/300s/200i/100m, +1 mana/s, +300 mana cap), colosseum (🏟️, Bronze Age, barracks×2, cost 400g/350s/120i, +3 food/s), grandCathedral (⛪, Medieval Age, manaWell×2+wall×2, cost 600g/400s/200i/150m, +8 gold/s, +500 gold cap). actions.js: buildBuilding() rejects unique buildings when count≥1; trainUnit() chains Colosseum -33% speed after warcraft -25%. research.js: startResearch() applies -25% totalTicks when greatLibrary built; totalTicks stored in queue entry. resources.js: grandCathedral halves disaster penalty in activeModifiers loop (1-(1-rateMult)*0.5). buildingPanel.js: rewritten to for-loop; injects '🏛️ Wonders' section header before first wonder; shows 'Built ✓' badge + description for already-built unique buildings (no actions); wonder cards get .building-card--wonder gold border class; Construct button uses .btn--wonder. researchPanel.js: progress bar uses active.totalTicks ?? def.researchTicks for Library-adjusted display. CSS: .wonder-section-header (grid-column:1/-1, gold text), .building-card--wonder (gold border tint), .building-card--wonder-built (solid gold border), .btn--wonder (gold gradient button).
